channel.title: EnergyTagger DJ Stable Updates
channel.description: Stable signed updates for EnergyTagger DJ.

item.title: EnergyTagger DJ v1.1.0
item.description:
EnergyTagger DJ v1.1.0

Public signed Sparkle update for EnergyTagger DJ v1.1.0.

  • UI redesign foundation with professional dark/glass DJ utility styling.
  • Professional macOS app icon integration.
  • DJ MUSIC Library Organizer preview/read-only module.
  • Copied-test-folder scan preview and metadata validation presentation.
  • Smart Crate Builder, DJ Set Prep, and Serato Prep Checklist foundations remain planning/instruction-only.
  • Real-library writes, Serato crate writes, arbitrary scans, downloads, and production DB writes on launch remain blocked.
  • Updates require user confirmation.

item.title: EnergyTagger DJ v1.0.2 Read-Only Birthday Prep Edition
item.description:
EnergyTagger DJ v1.0.2

Signed Sparkle update test release for end-to-end detection/install validation.

  • Verifies in-app update detection/install from v1.0.1 to v1.0.2.
  • No tag-writing behavior changed.
  • Real-library tag writing remains blocked.
  • Serato crate modification remains blocked.
  • Updates require user confirmation.
  • Silent install remains disabled.
